title: ESP32 Air Mouse
desc: Control your computer cursor with hand gestures using ESP32 and MPU6050!
fullDesc: Build an interactive Air Mouse dashboard and hardware device! Using an ESP32 microcontroller, an MPU6050 gyroscope/accelerometer sensor, and Bluetooth or Serial communication, you can control your PC's cursor by moving your hand in the air. The web dashboard visualizes the real-time sensor data, including gyroscope angles, calibration parameters, and mouse actions.
components: Web Browser with Web Serial API support
author: Ved
guide: Wire the MPU6050 sensor to the ESP32 using I2C
Flash the Air Mouse firmware onto your ESP32
Open the Air Mouse dashboard and connect via Serial
Calibrate the gyroscope sensors for steady motion tracking
Move your hand in the air to control the cursor on screen!
